Gmail.title: Gmail
Gmail.description: Read your email so the assistant can prep meetings, follow up on threads, and surface commitments. First-party Google MCP; OAuth on Connect; read-only scope available.

Google Calendar.title: Google Calendar
Google Calendar.description: Read your calendar to prepare you for upcoming meetings and track your schedule. First-party Google MCP; OAuth on Connect; read-only scope available.

Google Drive.title: Google Drive
Google Drive.description: Search and read your documents for context. First-party Google MCP; OAuth on Connect; read-only scope available.
